Added kasra at the end because it follows ذِى (possessor of) in the ayah. The alif is written as a long alif (ٰ) in this word.
Connected the root letters with fatha vowels to form basic past tense verb
Changed to a noun meaning 'the act of honoring' by adding إِ at start and changing vowels
Added ال to make it specific
Added و to connect this word to what came before it

steps.m: and the honoring (possessed by رَبِّكَ - your Lord)
steps.n: Added kasra at end to show this describes رَبِّكَ (your Lord)
